StyledText.Data: <<FAT Title::Reference title>> | Number of text chunks: <<FAT Text::Number of records>> | Number of words in found set: <<Number of words total>>

Calculation.Text: Case (IsEmpty(FAT Text::gPackage); SetProperty ( "level" ; 0 ); SetProperty ( "exportMode" ; "Media update" ) & SetProperty ( "level" ; 1 ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "title" ) )

Case ( Not IsEmpty (FAT Text translated::gPackage ); SetProperty ( "level" ; 1 ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "title" ) & SetProperty ( "server_mode" ; "Preview" ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; FAT Package @ Translation Selected::Export Package Sub Path ) & SetProperty ( "package_friendly_id" ; FAT Package @ Translation Selected::JSON Friendly id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type_name" ; FAT Package @ Translation Selected::Package type name ); "" )
IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type) Or notDeveloper
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"
FAT Text::Source item type = "symbol" And notDeveloper
FAT Text::Source item type ≠ "global" Or (isEditor Or isTranslator)
"Add no translate tag to a text selection"

StyledText.Data: Text <<RecordNumberReference>> in package <<FAT Package @ Text::Reference name>>
Text <<RecordNumberReference>> can belong to multiple packages
Global texts can be accessed everywhere in the Title. The text id:s can be referenced in the code.

Calculation.Text: "Export all texts to a Word document (HTML)"
"View all texts in the whole Title"
